chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI First Appeal No.94 of 2016 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection/reply ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For hearing of CMA 2719/16 Dated: 16.10.2023 Mr. Muhammad Nawaz holds brief for Mr. Munir Ahmed Malik for appellants. None for respondents. -.-.- It is stated by the learned counsel for the appellants that they are not in contact with the appellants. Appeal as such is dismissed for non- prosecution along with listed application. Judge Judge
